name: Palo Alto AutoFocus
description: Integrate with Palo Alto Networks AutoFocus to search samples, sessions, and tags from the WildFire threat intelligence cloud

auth_config.note: API key is sent in the JSON request body as the 'apiKey' field for POST requests

actions.name: Search Samples
actions.description: Search WildFire samples by hash, filename, behavior, or other criteria using AutoFocus query syntax

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: AutoFocus search query object with field, operator, and value

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Search scope: global, unit42, private, public

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort configuration with field and order

actions.name: Get Sample Search Results
actions.description: Retrieve results from a previously initiated AutoFocus sample search using the af_cookie

parameters.name: af_cookie
parameters.description: AutoFocus cookie returned from the search request

actions.name: Search Sessions
actions.description: Search WildFire sessions (network traffic records) associated with malware samples

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Search scope: global, unit42, private, public

actions.name: Get Session Search Results
actions.description: Retrieve results from a previously initiated session search

parameters.name: af_cookie
parameters.description: AutoFocus cookie from the session search request

actions.name: Get Sample Analysis
actions.description: Retrieve the WildFire analysis report for a specific sample by hash

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: SHA-256 hash of the sample to retrieve analysis for

parameters.name: coverage
parameters.description: Include coverage information (AV signatures, DNS signatures)

actions.name: Search Tags
actions.description: Search AutoFocus tags including Unit 42 research tags for threat actor and campaign context

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Tag name or keyword to search

actions.name: Get Tag Details
actions.description: Retrieve details for a specific AutoFocus tag including description, associated indicators, and references

actions.name: Export Indicators
actions.description: Export AutoFocus artifacts (indicators) in STIX or JSON format for EDL or SIEM ingestion

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: Export label/name for the indicator list

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Filter query for indicators to export
